name: Fusilli with Smoked Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and sauté until translucent, about 8 to 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the cognac and cook on low heat for 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Pour in the heavy cream and simmer on low heat for another 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the smoked salmon and chives; cook on low heat for an additional 5 minutes, then set aside.
6. Boil the fusilli pasta until al dente. Drain and add to the sauce.
7. Serve with optional sprinkles of capers and chives.
